lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ah, 'tis a foine day to be sure! Were yez wantin' me to store yer tools, or maybe ye might be wantin' yer stuff back from me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here in Weiss?

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: An' why would I not be here? Now that there be farming patches, there'll be folk needing a leprechaun to hold their stuff! So, dod ye want to be using the store?

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: We'll hold onto yer rake, yer seed dibber, yer spade, yer secateurs, yer waterin' can and yer trowel - but mind it's not one of them fancy trowels only archaeologists use!

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: We'll take a few buckets off yer hands too, and even yer compost, supercompost an' ultracompost! Also plant cure vials.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Aside from that, if ye hands me yer farming produce, I can mebbe change it into banknotes for ye.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: So... do ye want to be using the store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do with the tools you're storing? They can't possibly all fit in your pockets!

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: We leprechauns have a shed where we keep 'em. It's a magic shed, so ye can get yer items back from any of us leprechauns whenever ye want. Saves ye havin' to carry loads of stuff around the country!

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: So... do ye want to be using the store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll keep hold of my stuff.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ye must be dafter than ye look if ye likes luggin' yer tools everywhere ye goes!

sections.title: Using an item on the Tool Leprechaun

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Nay, I've got no banknotes to exchange for that item.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Nay, there's no such thing as a banknote for that.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: A cabbage? Don't ye go showing me yer cabbage; this whole farm stinks of the things! Take it away and get it exchanged somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Tool Leprechaun
lines.text: Ye did foine, yer'll be wanting this!
